title: Click and pan to react before the opportunity disappears
body: When new information appears, do not freeze while deciding. Click your character toward the possible play first, then pan your camera to evaluate conditions while you are already moving. This keeps your reactions fast without forcing you to commit if the play is actually dead on arrival.
actionables: When a skirmish starts on screen or minimap, move first and analyze during the movement.
If the situation is bad after the camera pan, cancel the move and return to route immediately.
Review missed opportunities and ask whether you lost them by analyzing too early while standing still.

source.title: Solving The #1 SoloQ Problem (How To Carry Bad Teams) — Jungle Guide
source.notes: Built from Leo's click-and-pan routine for reacting quickly without blind committing.
